sources.title: OpenAI Solution Architect Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Median package is tagged L4, $418K TC (base $218K / stock $200K / bonus $0); no distinct L3 entry.

sources.title: OpenAI Data Architect Salary | Levels.fyi
sources.note: $166K-$236K range — a different job title bucketed under the same OpenAI job family, useful only as a loose sanity check for junior levels.

sources.title: OpenAI Solution Architect Salary in San Francisco Bay Area | Levels.fyi
sources.note: Bay Area range $418K-$540K TC; modeled L5 TC (~$593K) runs somewhat above the top of this range.
